name: elasticsearch
description: Reads Elasticsearch index metadata and documents through the REST API. Read-only.

risk.read: external Elasticsearch cluster read of index metadata and documents

conformance.reason: auth-dependent (mode:custom AuthHook is the FIRST candidate, and conformance's synthetic non-secret config populates api_key_id with a truthy synthetic-conformance-value, so its when-gate always matches during dynamic replay); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/elasticsearch/hooks_test.go (api-key/basic/none auth precedence and the documents-stream _source flatten) -- conformance's dynamic replay runs with Hooks=nil (hookset registration is orchestrator-owned, wave6 scope) and cannot exercise the custom auth candidate or the RecordHook flatten at all
